text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm stopping by the central plaza, I
spot Inari One and Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What's this? Cleats and textbooks? What're these
doing 'round here?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Flea market, don'tcha think? Just look at how
they're organized.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and take them... if you'd like. A loser
like me won't be needing them anymore...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh? Izzat so?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so hasty! How d'ya know you're never
gonna wanna run again in the future, eh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Tama, c'mon, ya gotta play it a li'l cooler than
that. Don't force it.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wait. That photo you've got there, was it taken
during a race? You're givin' this away too?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh, a photo? I don't remember... Did I mix it up
when I was organizing my things?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh... This was when I won my first race. What's it
doing here?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Look at the big ol' smile ya got there! I knew
it—you do love raci—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, ya don't need this no more! It'll just hold ya
back!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go toss this away for ya! I'll be back in a
jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh, wh-what are you—W-w-wait up!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Come back, Inari! Return the girl's photo!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Not a chance! This is going where it belongs! If
you want it back, you'll have to catch me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Come on! Catch me if you can!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You just gonna sit there 'n let that idiot run away?
She's serious, y'know?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Phew... Looks like they aren't on my tail anymore. I wonder if they gave up.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: WAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Haha! You'd scare a boiled octopus back
to life with that face!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm having fun! Come at me! I'm so ready for
a tussle!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaaa... Haah... Hnnng...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eager to retrieve her photo, the Umamusume
makes a mad dash for Inari One... before stopping
herself.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Why... Why?! I already made up my mind to
quit...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Talk to me, how are you feeling?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to catch up so badly... Losing was so, so
frustrating but... I still want to win!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, I think that settles it. Sounds like you've got
some racin' to do.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Glad ya decided to give it another go! And Inari,
nice goin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Just remember it's all uphill from here. You're
treadin' a thorny path of blood, sweat, and tears.
But once you've overcome it, let's tussle again!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Okay!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Looks like all's well that ends well!
